videoSnippet.title: World Champion Mentality || Volodar Murzin vs Arjun Erigaisi || 3+0 Thursday
videoSnippet.description:
Download Lotus Chess Here! https://onelink.to/lotus-agadmator https://tournament.lotus-chess.com/tournaments
Search all my videos easy https://agadmator-library.github.io/

Murzin, Volodar (3267) - Erigaisi Arjun (3273)
3 0 Thursday 2026 (Chess.com) [11] 2026.07.10
A04 Reti opening

1.Nf3 b6 2.g3 Bb7 3.Bg2 g6 4.O-O Bg7 5.d3 Nf6 6.e4 O-O 7.Nfd2 e5 8.f4 d6 9.Nc3 Nbd7 10.Nc4 a6 11.f5 b5 12.Ne3 b4 13.Ne2 a5 14.g4 Re8 15.Ng3 g5 16.h4 gxh4 17.Nh1 h6 18.Nf2 Nb6 19.Nh3 d5 20.g5 hxg5 21.Nxg5 dxe4 22.Ng4 exd3 23.Bxb7 Qd4+ 24.Nf2 Rab8 25.Bc6 e4 26.Bxe8 Rxe8 27.Re1 e3 28.Bxe3 Rxe3 29.Nf3 Rxe1+ 30.Nxe1 d2 31.Nf3 Qxb2 32.Rb1 Qxa2 33.Nxd2 Qd5 34.Nde4 Qxf5 35.Qd3 Qg6+ 36.Kh1 Nbd5 37.Rg1 Qh6 38.Ng4 Nxg4 39.Qxd5 Nf6 40.Qd8+ Kh7 41.Ng5+ Kg6 42.Qd3+ Kh5 43.Qf3+ Kg6 44.Ne6+ Kh7 45.Nxg7
